pwaReferenceBoard.rule: Do not crop, extract, or publish collage-board tiles as final model/background assets.

routes./closet: PWA/member home with model discovery, Black Card gate, AI chat/video entry points, and approved neon closet background.
routes./closet/[slug]: Model profile plus outfit selector and Black Card unlock flow.
routes./closet/[slug]/viewer: Full-body 360 viewer with wardrobe, environment, measurement, capture, chat, and video controls.
routes./closet/[slug]/chat: Gated AI text and voice chat UI.
routes./api/closet/access: Read-only gate status for Supabase auth plus Shopify Black Card entitlement readiness.

approvalRules: Do not claim live voice/video is active until tested with a verified member entitlement.
Do not use collage-board crops as final source images.
Do not activate live Shopify payments without Jeremy approval.
Do not mutate Supabase production schema without explicit approval.
